hero_subtitle: SFTY links fragmented transaction and wallet risk data with customer and counterparty context to provide VASP operations a structured, auditable compliance workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Transaction risk signals lack contextual clarity
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to connect wallet and transaction risk data with customer and counterparty profiles. This disconnect slows risk assessment, complicates case management and weakens the audit trail needed for defensible decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links wallet and transaction risk signals with customer, counterparty and case data into one unified workflow so compliance teams gain clearer context, stronger traceability and improved operational control.
workflow_title: From fragmented risk profiles to cases
workflow_description: SFTY connects transaction risk from multiple providers to customer, wallet and counterparty context for structured review, case creation, decision and audit evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented risk profiles. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented transaction, customer, wallet and counterparty risk signals into structured workflows, decisions, cases and evidence for clearer operational control and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs by consolidating transaction risk with customer, wallet, and counterparty context to deliver auditable evidence and controlled enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how to connect transaction risk to customer context
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how transaction risk links to wallet and counterparty data
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence-grade audit logs support risk review workflows
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration models for fragmented compliance data
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY address provider fragmentation?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into connected workflows, improving risk visibility and reducing manual handoffs across onboarding, KYT, Travel Rule, case management and reporting processes.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY link transaction risk data?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates transaction risk with customer, wallet and counterparty context, linking fragmented data into structured reviews and cases for clearer operational insights.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence in audit-ready formats, supporting traceability of compliance decisions and review readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools, connecting their outputs into controlled workflows without requiring replacement.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace compliance providers; it orchestrates their outputs into structured, auditable workflows to enhance operational compliance.
final_title: Connect transaction risk to customer workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY aggregates fragmented wallet, transaction and counterparty risk into structured cases and audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
